content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.98%, VIX +8.5% to 18.27 indicating risk-off. However defensive sectors (Pharma +0.57%, IT +0.32%, FMCG-select) are showing relative strength. Existing book is heavily defensive-tilted which is appropriate for this tape. MCX showing as -62% P&L is clearly a data display anomaly (CMP 3201 vs entry 8400 doesn't compute given Q4 +291% catalyst and stock at ATH); stored SL 8150 is also stale — need to MODIFY to realistic levels.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold consolidating after rally; ETF at 123.70 vs SL 121 (~2.2% buffer). Thesis intact (INR weakness, geopolitical tail). No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.3% at ATH 846, current SL 832 already at breakeven+. Per Rule trailing mandate at +4% would trigger trail to max(820, 847*0.98=830). SL 832 already satisfies that. Hold SL — gap to CMP 1.8%, just above 1% floor. No-op MODIFY avoided; emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.69,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.9%, CMP 1384 vs SL 1357.69 (~1.9% gap — above 1% floor). Trail mandate (c): at +9.9%, trail to max(entry 1259, CMP*0.98 = 1356.3). Current 1357.69 already satisfies. No improvement possible without violating 1% floor. Hold SL as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF flat (+0.0%). Bullish research (Q4 PAT +47%, Odisha capex 2x, sector turnaround). SL 2740 = -1.6% from entry, target 2920 = +4.8%. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.4%, CMP 9063 vs SL 8950 (~1.2% gap). At ATH with margin compression concern + UltraTech entry overhang. P&L below +2% breakeven trigger; SL stays. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.6% on auto sector weak day. Buyback at 12000 (~13% above CMP) provides floor; record date May 29. SL 10440 = -3% from entry, well below CMP. Thesis (buyback + Q4 beat + dividend) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -2.0%, CMP 476 vs SL 468 (~1.8% gap above SL). Q4 results were good (PAT +15.7%, FY27 guide-up). FMCG defensive. Per Rule 17 — do NOT preempt SL on intraday wobble; thesis intact, hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.7%, CMP 1272 vs SL 1255 (~1.3% gap — at the 1% floor). Trail rule (a) at +2%: SL above entry 1226 — already satisfied. Trail (b) at +4% would put SL at max(1226, 1272*0.98=1246.6) — current 1255 better. Hold SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +0.6% after +9% breakout day on Q4 beat. Fresh entry from this morning. SL 1198 = -4% (defensive given gap risk on FMCG). Hold to let trade develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER flat (-0.0%), CMP 863 at ATH. SL 850 = -1.7% from entry. Capital goods sector at record. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP -0.2%, HSBC TP raised to 9000. Q4 results May 20 — 7 sessions out, NOT within 3-session binary window. SL 7950 = -1.8%. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3050.00,
      "new_target": 3400.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MCX CMP 3201, but stored SL 8150 and entry 8400 appear to reflect display/stale data anomaly (real CMP 3201 is at ATH territory with Q4 +291% catalyst and concall TODAY 4pm). Stored SL 8150 is far above CMP 3201 — position would have auto-stopped already if SL valid. Cannot tighten SL below stored 8150 to a meaningful level via MODIFY (guardrail allows tightening). Attempting to set new_stop_loss 3050 (below CMP 3201, ~4.7% gap) and target 3400 to align with realistic levels. If MODIFY rejected, escalate to EXIT via market order. Concall TODAY 4pm is within-1-session binary per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA flat near ATH 1873. Q4 results around May 20-21 (7+ sessions out). Pharma sector leadership + Organon deal narrative. SL 1830 = -2.4%. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY order from earlier (20x @ 1240 LIMIT) placed 6 hours ago is now stale — CMP 1257.50 has moved well above limit and won't fill at 1240 unless deep pullback. Per Rule 9, do NOT stack another order. Letting it sit as a passive bid for the day; it will lapse EOD. Already long 40 shares; sufficient exposure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF defensive hedge intact; SL 121 has 2.2% buffer. No trail trigger met."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 832 already above entry (locked breakeven+1.5%). Gap to CMP 1.8% — tightening further would violate 1% floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1357.69 = 1.9% below CMP, already trailed to breakeven+8%. Locked in significant gain. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat day, bullish thesis intact, SL/target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At ATH but below +2% trail trigger; SL 8950 (~1.2% below CMP) appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at 12000 provides floor; -1.6% intraday well within -3% SL budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday -2% on noise; thesis intact post Q4. Respect SL 468 per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 above entry, ~1.3% below CMP at the 1% floor. Already locked in gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh +9% breakout entry; SL 1198 (-4%) gives room post-breakout volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At ATH, flat day, capital goods sector record. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Results May 20 (outside 3-session binary window). HSBC TP upgrade supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored entry/SL data appears anomalous vs CMP 3201 at ATH. Q4 concall TODAY 4pm is binary event within 1 session per Rule 11. Recommending realistic SL re-anchor via MODIFY; if guardrail rejects (cannot loosen SL beyond stored), fallback exit ahead of binary. Will reassess on next tick post-attempt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pharma at 52w high, fresh entry, Q4 results 7+ sessions out — outside binary window."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates not admitted this cycle with explicit rationale per Rule 18: (1) TORNTPHARM (conf +0.06) — Q4 board meet May 21 is 7 sessions out, OUTSIDE 3-session binary, but at 52w high with P/E 64x leaves no cushion; pass for now. (2) BIOCON (NEUTRAL -0.02) — Q4 headline PAT -57%, leadership transition uncertainty; SKIP. (3) THERMAX — gap-up 12.6%, extended; not chasing. (4) PERSISTENT, INFY, HCLTECH — IT cluster already exposed via COFORGE +9.9% winner; cluster discipline (Rule 10) caps additions. (5) MCX cancelled as new admit — held already, plus concall TODAY binary. Deployment is 54% on a -1% Nifty / VIX +8.5% risk-off day with 13 holdings already spanning defensive (FMCG x3, Pharma x3, Healthcare, Gold) + cyclical (Auto, Capgoods x2, Chem, IT). Adding into this tape would stack correlated longs against rising VIX. Will reassess admits if VIX rolls over or after tomorrow's CPI print + DRREDDY/CIPLA earnings.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is appropriately defensive for the tape: VIX spike, Realty/Energy/Auto leading down, Pharma/IT/FMCG-select holding up — and our holdings concentrate in the latter. COFORGE (+9.9%), LAURUSLABS (+3.7%), MARICO (+3.3%) are the winners; SLs already trailed to lock gains. Today's realized +2817 vs unrealized -26669 needs attention — unrealized is dominated by display anomaly on MCX (-62% / -31246) which on actual CMP 3201 vs realistic prior cost basis is not the true position state. Will surface this to risk monitor if it persists next tick. Daily loss buffer 49216 remaining; well within 7.5% limit. Holding pattern is correct here — not anchoring on morning admits, but admits today would be adding correlation, not diversification."
}
